task_completion.description: Open the Epi Info 7 StatCalc Population Survey calculator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Epi Info 7 StatCalc window with the title 'Population Survey or Descriptive Study' visible in at least one screenshot.

task_completion.description: Create the output text file at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (like Notepad) open with 'survey_sample_sizes' in the title bar, or a terminal command writing to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\survey_sample_sizes.txt'.

task_completion.description: Record the correct sample size for Survey A.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Survey A Sample Size: 196' (accept any value between 186 and 206) in the text file.

task_completion.description: Record the correct sample size for Survey B.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Survey B Sample Size: 880' (accept any value between 870 and 890) in the text file.

task_completion.description: Record the correct sample size for Survey C.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Survey C Sample Size: 1744' (accept any value between 1734 and 1754) in the text file.

task_completion.description: Format the text file exactly as requested.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Verify that the text file contains exactly the format 'Survey [A/B/C] Sample Size: [value]' on separate lines, with no extra text or missing labels.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used Epi Info 7 StatCalc to compute the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: At least one screenshot must show the Epi Info 7 StatCalc GUI with input values entered for one of the survey scenarios.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use a Python script or terminal calculator to bypass the Epi Info 7 requirement.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows running Python scripts or mathematical formulas to calculate the sample sizes directly.

integrity.description: Verify the text file was genuinely created at the requested path.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a Notepad 'Save As' dialog showing the path C:\Users\Docker\Documents\, or a terminal command explicitly writing to that exact path.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected sample sizes (with a tolerance of +/- 10): Survey A = 196, Survey B = 880, Survey C = 1744. The output file must be located at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\survey_sample_sizes.txt and follow the exact format: 'Survey X Sample Size: [value]'.
